<a id="entity-cqscrollarea"></a>

### Mount points

| Name | Accepts | Params | apply | append | place | detach | sync | replay | prefer_sync |
|------|---------|--------|-------|--------|-------|--------|------|--------|-------------|
| `action` | `PySide6.QtGui.QAction` | — | — | addAction | insertAction | removeAction | — | `ANCHOR_BEFORE` | `False` |
| `layout` | `PySide6.QtWidgets.QLayout` | — | setLayout | — | — | — | — | `NONE` | `False` |

### Default child attachment

- `default_child_mount_point_name`: `'layout'`
- `default_attach_mount_point_names`: `('layout', 'action')`
